---
title: "Speaking"
description: "Video, talks, and how to book."
---

## Video

I publish video content on [YouTube, @Dr.BrandonRussell](https://www.youtube.com/@Dr.BrandonRussell) covering cybersecurity training topics, offensive security walk-throughs, and reflections on instructional design.

## Talks and presentations

Coming soon.

## Booking

I am available for guest lectures, departmental seminars, and industry events on cybersecurity training, offensive security, and military-to-academia transitions.

The fastest way to book me is email: [brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com](mailto:brandon.r.russell.1@gmail.com). Or reach out via the [contact page](contact.qmd).
